channel.title: Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content on Dillon de Silva

item.title: Part one: Inside my music creating process
item.description: My first writeup of a two part article series detailing creative tendencies I have and how to get started

item.title: About Moi :)
item.description: You ever just…want a digital archive of your brain? I am a passionate learner, likely to be found working on a complex problem, punching a bag at the gym or creating some music. Currently studying at The University of Sydney, my interests range from understanding the power of the mind to particle physics. Most of my writeups are about projects I’m working on but you’ll find I occasionally digress into poetry, my personal learnings and opinions on intriguing matters.
